item.title: My First Post
item.description: After leaving my job at Astraea in February, I’m been spending my time in sort of a mid-career re-evaluation and retooling. Part of the outcome from this is to actually take notes on many of the technologies I’ve used, and put them in a format I can actually refer to, hence: Old Possum’s Book of Practical Software Development When this gets a little more organized, it’ll probably have a tie-in with the T.

item.title: Resume
item.description: phil@philvarner.com github.com/philvarner linkedin.com/in/philvarner Overview I am an experienced software developer, with over 17 years building production software, in a variety of both formal and informal roles in the software development process, on a variety of tech stacks. I am pragmatic, passionate, broad, and serious but not solemn. Skills & Tools Scala, Java, Python, RESTful APIs, data modeling, Docker, AWS (S3, SQS, API Gateway, Lambda, IAM), Akka HTTP, relational databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL), Elasticsearch, Git, GitHub, Bash, OAuth 2.
